channel.title: LLM Timeline — Samsung Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Samsung.

item.title: TRM (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: 0.007B License: open Type: model "Tiny Recursive Model (TRM), a much simpler recursive reasoning approach that achieves significantly higher generalization than HRM, while using a single tiny network with only 2 layers"

item.title: Gauss (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: partial Type: model Gauss Language specializing in generating texts, Gauss Code on software and code description and Gauss Image for image creation.
